title: Xtra Creamy British Cox Apple Bubble And Squeak
description: A creamy, mustardy twist on the classic British dish, featuring Cox apples and a yuzu cure, perfect for a crowd-pleasing breakfast or brunch. This lacto-vegetarian friendly recipe is sure to delight.
instructions: In a large pan, melt the butter over medium heat and add the diced Cox apples, cooking until they are tender and lightly browned.
Add the yuzu cure, Dijon mustard, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
In a separate saucepan, whisk together the flour and milk, cooking over medium heat until the mixture thickens and forms a creamy sauce.
Add the grated cheddar cheese to the sauce and stir until melted and smooth.
Combine the cooked apple mixture and the creamy cheese sauce, stirring to combine.
Add the leftover mashed potatoes to the pan, stirring until they are well coated with the apple and cheese mixture.
Using a spatula, shape the mixture into a round, flat shape, similar to a pancake.
Cook the bubble and squeak for an additional 5-7 minutes, until the bottom is golden brown and crispy.
Flip the bubble and squeak over and cook for an additional 5 minutes, until the other side is also golden brown.
Serve the Xtra Creamy British Cox Apple Bubble And Squeak hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
